title: peganum harmala
intro: Peganum harmala, also known as Syrian rue or harmal, is a flowering plant native to the Middle East and South Asia, belonging to the family Zygophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peganum harmala include its ability to protect against neurodegenerative diseases, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antiviral and anticancer properties. Peganum harmala can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any medicinal plant.
